allies.rationale_text: Habit-formation helps self-control shift good behavior from effortful restraint into automatic support.
Metacognitive-questioning helps self-control create the pause needed to inspect impulse before action.

antagonists.rationale_text: Confirmation-bias makes self-control rationalize a preferred impulse instead of examining it honestly.

structured_tensions.tension_text: Self-control conflicts with flow when deliberate self-monitoring interrupts the automatic absorption that flow states require.
structured_tensions.source_quote: self-control conflicts with flow (flow) when deliberate self-monitoring interrupts the automatic absorption that flow states require.

structured_tensions.tension_text: Self-control conflicts with incentives when extrinsic incentive structures undermine the intrinsic self-regulation that self-control develops.
structured_tensions.source_quote: self-control conflicts with incentives (incentives) when extrinsic incentive structures undermine the intrinsic self-regulation that self-control develops.
